{ "name": "shalvah/upgrader", "license": "MIT", "description": "Create automatic upgrades for your package.", "keywords": [ "upgrade" ], "homepage": "http://github.com/shalvah/upgrader", "authors": [ { "name": "Shalvah", "email": "hello@shalvah.me" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.0", "illuminate/support": ">=8.0", "nikic/php-parser": "^5.0" }, "require-dev": { "dms/phpunit-arraysubset-asserts": "^0.2.0", "pestphp/pest": "^1.21", "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.0", "spatie/ray": "^1.33" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Shalvah\\Upgrader\\": "src/" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Shalvah\\Upgrader\\Tests\\": "tests/" } }, "scripts": { "lint": "phpstan analyse -c ./phpstan.neon src --memory-limit 1G", "test": "pest --stop-on-failure --coverage --min=90", "test-ci": "pest" }, "config": { "preferred-install": "dist", "sort-packages": true, "process-timeout": 600, "allow-plugins": { "pestphp/pest-plugin": true } }, "funding": [ { "type": "patreon", "url": "https://patreon.com/shalvah" } ] }
